tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 8ee5f1c6-21f0-51f1-a484-22721e4c549c
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 1
        set uuid e016cd0e-21f0-51f1-53b5-bb7e9b396e24
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "attacker-192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "icmp-target-wan-7.0.14.254"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
delete 1
delete 2
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "Deny_ICMP_from_attacker"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "attacker-192.168.1.3"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set service "PING"
set schedule "always"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 2
set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set nat enable
next
end"}
